suppress.notes: False positive: CVE-2020-29582 affects kotlin.io.path.createTempFile default permissions. kotlin-stdlib-common is a transitive dependency from the Anthropic Java SDK — this project does not use Kotlin APIs or create temp files via Kotlin.

CVE-2026-29062: nesting depth bypass in UTF8DataInputJsonParser. Fixed in Jackson 3.1.0, but Spring Boot 4.0.3 requires Jackson 3.0.x (3.1.0 has breaking API changes). Mitigated: this app does not accept untrusted deeply-nested JSON input. Revisit when Spring Boot upgrades to Jackson 3.1.x.
